text: I find myself at the threshold of departure, gazing back at a space of progress and creativity. The first room buzzes with a residual energy, tools and ladders scattered—a testament to work and collaboration. In the next, bold colors and ideas leap from the walls. I feel a quiet sense of closure, satisfaction mingling with the gentle anticipation of what comes next. The promise of return, encapsulated in "See You Next Time!", holds an optimism that warms me as I leave.
